meta.title: 1💗1 · Grow Together — a living from the land, without going it alone
meta.description: An ecological livelihood that starts from the community and reduces risk. Land, seedlings, hands and time — each person contributes their unique part, and together they create a harmonious, circular livelihood based on real demand.

hero.eyebrow: ◈ Ecological doing · Connection to the land · Creative community ◈
hero.h1: A living from the land — without doing it alone
hero.h2: An ecological profession starts from community, not from risk
hero.h3: Everyone brings what they have and love — together a livelihood grows
hero.h4: From the eater back to the soil — one whole, harmonious circle
hero.h5: Start from the customers. The business is built around the need
hero.sub: No initial capital, land purchase or going it alone is required. Everyone brings their share — land, seedlings, working hands, time or a desire to consume — and 1💗1's cooperative model coordinates everything transparently and shares the fruits fairly.
hero.ctaSecondary: I want to order a local veggie box 🥬

problem.title: The difficulty of founding an agricultural venture alone
problem.lead: The dream sounds simple and pure: to work the land, grow healthy food and earn a dignified living. But in reality, the challenges on the ground are almost impassable for individuals.
problem.b1: Lack of available land — and a natural fear among landowners of renting it out long-term.
problem.b2: High setup costs for equipment, seedlings and infrastructure before the first product is sold.
problem.b3: Marketing instability — without guaranteed customers upfront, a significant portion of the yield may go to waste.
problem.b4: Burnout and loneliness — hard physical work around the clock, without the ability to take rest days or backup.
problem.cost: This is how the dream fades, and the fertile land remains desolate.
problem.turn: At 1💗1 we turn every barrier into an opportunity for another partner in the circle ✿

weave.title: The weave — a living partnership inspired by nature
weave.sub: In 1💗1, a partnership is called a 'weave' — inspired by living tissue in a living body. Each cell in the weave has full independence, a unique role and freedom of action, and together they create a whole, pulsing, functioning organism that enables shared flourishing without giving up personal freedom.
weave.r1_t: 🌍 The soil cell and anchor of the venture
weave.r1_d: Provides available land for the venture, participates in decision-making and enjoys a fair return. The land comes back to life instead of lying fallow.
weave.r2_d: Prepares and nurtures quality seedlings as part of the initial investment in the weave, and professionally accompanies the growing process.
weave.r3_d: Comes to practical work in the field out of passion and connection to the land. Working hours and energy are transparently translated into ownership in the weave.
weave.r4_d: Ensures continuity and stability. When rest or vacation is needed, other partners support and fill in, so the land and weave continue to flourish.
weave.r5_t: ⚖️ The nervous system: synchronization and fairness
weave.r5_d: 1💗1's technological interface functions like a quiet nervous system: it coordinates, documents each cell's contribution, and distributes profits by full consensus.
weave.note: There is no pyramidal structure of 'employers' and 'employees' here. There is an equal weave — each cell has freedom and independence, and everyone complements one another in harmony.

demand.title: Start from the community — reduce the risk
demand.sub: Instead of growing and hoping someone buys, we flip the equation and base everything on pre-defined demand.
demand.p1: Local residents express interest and pre-order a regular seasonal vegetable box.
demand.p2: Around this demand, landowners, growers and carers in the same area organize together.
demand.p3: We grow exactly what was ordered and in the required quantity — no surplus, no waste and maximum freshness.
demand.basket: 🥬 A weekly, local and rich vegetable box — built especially for the people waiting for it.

paths.title: Two growth paths — your choice
paths.simple_d: Grow, sell, and income is automatically and simply divided among all partners according to their investment ratio and hours.
paths.economy_d: Building a comprehensive subscription system around the community's needs: weekly boxes, complementary products and broad community integration.
paths.note: You can start simply with basic sales, and expand to a full local economy at the pace that's right for you.

how.title: Four simple steps to get started
how.s1_d: Available land? Growing ability? Free time and working hands? Or perhaps a wish to support as consumers? Every contribution is an excellent starting point.
how.s2_d: We connect complementary partners in the same geographic area to create a harmonious and balanced working group.
how.s3_d: We define and approve digitally and clearly in advance the division of roles, investments and how profits are shared.
how.s4_d: The garden sets off, the produce reaches consumers, and income is shared according to the model agreed upon transparently.

who.title: Who is this for?
who.sub: For anyone who wants to take part in real ecological and social change, and for anyone who wants to consume clean, quality food.
who.w1_d: Who want to see their land yielding and returning life, through social involvement and partnership.
who.w2_d: People who want to turn their passion into practical, rewarding agricultural work without capital.
who.w3_t: Farmers at the beginning of their journey
who.w3_d: Who want to gain practical experience, build community and reduce the startup and marketing risks involved in starting alone.
who.w4_d: Who aspire to strengthen their economic and social resilience through cooperative, connecting local agriculture.
who.w5_d: People who want fresh, local vegetables directly from the field, and to get to know the partners who grew them.

values.title: The values that drive us
values.v1_d: From seed to plate and back to the soil. We minimize the intermediary gaps and food waste to the minimum possible.
values.v2_d: Each partner focuses on what they do best and love. The work is done from connection and fulfilment, not from burnout.
values.v3_d: Clear and accessible documentation of every hour, resource and fruit enables building long-term relationships based on true partnership.

cta.title: The land is ready, the community is waiting
cta.sub: Whether you have land to offer, working hands, professional knowledge — or simply a desire to eat healthy local food — there's a place for you in our circle.
